text: System shall run on a deterministic sim tick
All inter-module messages shall be timestamped
System shall operate ARINC429-lite and AFDX-lite concurrently
System shall enforce partition-level fault containment
System shall support sensor/bus/compute fault injection
All test results shall be exported as evidence bundle
Evidence bundle shall include git SHA tool version seed and hash
System shall provide bidirectional req-test trace
System shall report orphan requirements and trace gaps
System shall log deadline misses to health monitor
System shall support cold and warm start sequences
System shall log degraded mode entry/exit
AI assistant outputs shall be draft and never auto-merged
Workbench UI shall surface mode confusion risk items
System shall produce MC/DC coverage for designated functions
FCC inputs shall pass range rate and freshness checks
FCC command and monitor lanes shall compute independently
FCC shall transition to Alternate on lane disagreement
FCC shall revert to Direct on dual sensor fault
FCC mode change shall notify DSP within 1 tick
Engine I/F shall classify exceedances as caution or warning
Engine I/F shall latch exceedance with hysteresis
Engine I/F shall detect hot and hung start patterns
DSP shall order alerts warning caution advisory
DSP shall follow red amber green usage rule
DSP shall update mode annunciation within 100 ms of FCC notice
DC shall timestamp every sensor input before publish
DC shall mark stale inputs with freshness flag
HM shall collect partition deadline and IPC errors
HM shall map faults to actions per config
